name: Route demo requests with HubSpot and Discord

parameters.formTitle: Route demo requests with HubSpot and Discord

parameters.content: =Hi {{ $json.name || 'there' }}, here's how to get started…
=Quick tip for {{ $json.company || 'your team' }} — see what others automate.
=✅ Route demo requests with HubSpot and Discord — run completed at {{ $now.toFormat('HH:mm') }}

### New Lead Form Submission

Serves an n8n-hosted form (Email, Company, Score). Each submission becomes one execution.

Next: Stamp & Shape Lead

### Stamp & Shape Lead

Shapes the item: writes `leadId`, `receivedAt`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Payload Valid?

### Payload Valid?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.leadId }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Segment Audience · ②→ Record Rejected Input

### Record Rejected Input

Creates or updates a HubSpot contact by email — HubSpot is the CRM system of record for this pipeline.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Segment Audience

Two-way gate on `={{ ($json.score ?? 50) >= 50 }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Step 1 — Welcome (Discord) · ②→ Tag for Slow Nurture

### Step 1 — Welcome (Discord)

Posts to a Discord channel via an incoming webhook — no bot token needed, the webhook URL on the credential is the only secret.

Ports: ①→ Wait Before Step 2 · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Discord webhook URL

### Tag for Slow Nurture

Creates or updates a HubSpot contact by email — HubSpot is the CRM system of record for this pipeline.

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Wait Before Step 2

Pauses 3 days — spacing calls to respect rate limits.

Next: Converted Already?

### Converted Already?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.status }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Step 2 — Value Nudge (Discord) · ②→ Mark Converted — Stop Drip

### Step 2 — Value Nudge (Discord)

Posts to a Discord channel via an incoming webhook — no bot token needed, the webhook URL on the credential is the only secret.

Ports: ①→ Update Drip Status · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Discord webhook URL

### Mark Converted — Stop Drip

Creates or updates a HubSpot contact by email — HubSpot is the CRM system of record for this pipeline.

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Update Drip Status

Creates or updates a HubSpot contact by email — HubSpot is the CRM system of record for this pipeline.

Ports: ①→ Summarize Run Stats · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (HubSpot)

### Append Audit Row (HubSpot)

Creates or updates a HubSpot contact by email — HubSpot is the CRM system of record for this pipeline.

Ports: ①→ Send Summary to Discord · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Send Summary to Discord

Posts to a Discord channel via an incoming webhook — no bot token needed, the webhook URL on the credential is the only secret.

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Discord webhook URL

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Slack

### Escalate Failure to Slack

Posts a message to Slack (`#sales`) — a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

# Route demo requests with HubSpot and Discord

**Pattern:** Lead Capture & Routing · **Level:** Advanced · **Trigger:** Form

## What it does
Route demo requests with HubSpot and Discord. It starts from a hosted form submission.

## Why it exists
Manual routing is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
New Lead Form Submission → Stamp & Shape Lead → Payload Valid? → Segment Audience → Step 1 — Welcome (Discord) → Wait Before Step 2 → Converted Already? → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to lead capture & routing without manual effort
- Anyone automating routing in sales
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Keeps your systems in sync
- Improves response time
- Runs 24/7 in the background

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Discord webhook URL; HubSpot private-app token; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## Try it now
Sample data is pinned on the trigger — hit **Execute Workflow** to watch it flow through every node before connecting any real credentials. Unpin the trigger (right-click → Unpin) when you're ready to go live.

## Design decisions

Every step checks 'Converted Already?' before sending — a drip campaign that keeps emailing someone who already bought is the fastest way to burn trust. The Wait node's durable resume state (via `webhookId`) is what lets a multi-day wait survive an n8n restart instead of being held only in memory.

## Practice exercises

You've got the basics covered — push further:

1. Add a 4th drip step with its own wait/exit-check pair.
2. Manually flip a test record's status to 'converted' mid-drip and confirm the ladder stops sending.
3. Shorten the wait durations so the full ladder runs in minutes instead of days, for testing.

## 🛟 Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3× with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail → context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## ⏱ Rate limiting

Work is batched and spaced with Wait so provider quotas aren't tripped. If you hit 429s, lower the batch size or raise the wait — throughput drops, reliability rises.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your routing process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
